title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VII. LOUISIANA TELEHEALTH ACCESS ACT

§1223.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Telehealth Access Act".

            Acts 2014, No. 442, §2; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.401 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART VII.  LOUISIANA TELEHEALTH ACCESS ACT
§1223.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Telehealth Access Act".
Acts 2014, No. 442, §2; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.401 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
